books.title: All the Stars
books.author: Orie Shenhar
books.tagline: Sometimes, the bravest thing a ruined heart can do is keep beating anyway.
books.description:
Apollo Ryland measures his life in decibels and dirty laundry. He is all edges and echo: a boy stitched together with duct tape, bad jokes, and the brittle click of broken lighters. The night his mother's heart stopped, something in him went silent too, and he's been turning the volume up ever since, trying to drown out the static of a father who's already gone without leaving.

Rae Sunder used to paint like the world was on fire. Now she moves through it like smoke, thin and gray and hard to hold. The only one left after a car crash rewrote her family into past tense, she lives in borrowed rooms and borrowed time, leaving pressed flowers in pockets and apologies in the margins of library books.

They meet after midnight, in a park that belongs to no one and everyone: him with his headphones, her with her camera, two ghosts testing whether they're still solid. As Apollo's lyrics start to sound like Rae and Rae's sketches start to look like Apollo, friendship blurs at the edges, bleeding into something softer, sharper, more dangerous.

In a world that keeps insisting they're survivable damage, Apollo and Rae become each other's proof that being alive is not the same as living — and that sometimes, the bravest thing a ruined heart can do is keep beating anyway.

books.title: Soaring
books.author: Orie Shenhar
books.tagline: Their story is one of pain transformed into power, and friendship strong enough to stand against the dark.
books.description:
Valarie had always been the quiet protector, carrying her family's pain long after everyone else walked away. When her sister Isla fled home to escape their father's cruelty, Valarie blamed herself, until the truth came out and shattered everything. Saving Isla sparked a fire she could never put out.

Maia's story was one of light turned to chaos. After losing her mother and enduring years of cruelty, she grew up in an orphanage branded as "trouble." At eighteen, she was free but broken, until a moment in a coffee shop, when a furious man raised his hand, and Valarie stepped between them.

That moment bonded them. Together, they turned survival into purpose, becoming women's-rights lawyers fighting for those who can't fight back. With their circle of allies, they built a movement to protect others from the monsters that once ruled their lives.

Their story is one of pain transformed into power, and friendship strong enough to stand against the dark. And to remind you to soar.

books.title: Trailborn
books.author: Orie Shenhar
books.tagline: A story about finding out who you are — by stepping into a story bigger than yourself.
books.description:
Max's life was normal — until the day a dragon-shaped cloud appeared over the town square and a mysterious message lit up his phone: "Max, you've been chosen."

At midnight, inside an abandoned library, a glowing book floats in the air. When Max opens it, the pages pull him in — and suddenly he's inside the Realm of Stories, a world where purple trees twist toward green skies, shadow creatures lurk in every corner, and the story itself is alive.

Alongside Alira the warrior, Jax the thief, and Lyra the shape-shifter, Max faces a series of trials that test his courage, his fears, and what he's willing to fight for. With each challenge, a strange new power awakens inside him — and so does the realization that this world's fate is tied to his own.

Part adventure, part journey of self-discovery, Trailborn is a story about finding out who you are — by stepping into a story bigger than yourself.
